install.from source: git clone https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw.git && cd openclaw && pnpm install && pnpm build
install.note: Requires Node.js >= 22.14.0 (IMPORTANT: v22.12.0 and below will fail at runtime). ALWAYS run `node --version` first and verify the result is >= 22.14.0 before installing. If lower, upgrade from https://nodejs.org before proceeding. For REMOTE servers via SSH, skip --onboard to avoid interactive prompts. The onboard step installs the Gateway daemon (launchd/systemd).
